# Outlook Power Tools

Chrome extension that brings back email templates, quick steps, keyboard shortcuts, and attachment reminder to New Outlook (OWA).

## Problem

Microsoft removed or limited several productivity features when transitioning to New Outlook:
- Quick Steps with custom email templates (new email, reply with template)
- Custom keyboard shortcuts for email actions
- Reliable attachment reminder

Outlook Power Tools is a Chrome extension that restores these features directly in the browser.

## Features

### Email Templates
Save any email as a reusable template with subject line, body text, and recipients. Insert templates into compose with two clicks from the popup or the in-page Templates button.

### Quick Steps
Chain multiple email actions into a single click. Supported actions: mark as read, move to folder, flag, forward to, reply with template, delete. Create custom combos like "Mark as read + Move to Archive" and trigger them from the toolbar.

### Keyboard Shortcuts
Record any key combination (Ctrl+Shift+T, etc.) and bind it to insert a template, trigger a quick step, or perform native Outlook actions (archive, flag, move to folder).

### Attachment Reminder
Detects when you mention "attached", "attachment", "file", or similar keywords in English and Russian, then warns you before sending if no attachment is present.

## Pricing

- Free: 3 templates, 3 quick steps, 3 keyboard shortcuts, attachment reminder (always free)
- Pro Monthly: $3.99/month (PayPal, cancel anytime)
- Pro Yearly: $29.99/year (PayPal, save 37%)

## Technical Details

- Chrome Extension Manifest V3
- Works on: outlook.live.com, outlook.office.com, outlook.office365.com
- Data stored locally in chrome.storage.sync
- No email content is read, stored, or transmitted
- Anonymous usage analytics only (feature counts, no PII)
- Payment processing via PayPal (extension does not handle payment data)

## Links

- Website: https://outlookpowertools.com/
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/outlook-power-tools
- Privacy Policy: https://outlookpowertools.com/privacy.html
